andrew-mateljan.flyerTitle: Founder & Director of Tennis · Head Coach, LBHS Boys Varsity Tennis
andrew-mateljan.flyerBio: Ranked #3 in SoCal and #12 nationally as a junior. Competed professionally, then spent seven years coaching across Spain, Croatia, and Norway. Currently coaches Karue Sell (#268 ATP) and has coached at Masters 1000 events on the professional tour. Has placed junior players at colleges across all divisions — including South Carolina, Yale, and Cornell. Founder of Fit4Tennis, serving 100K+ users worldwide.

peter-defrantz.flyerTitle: Head Coach, Junior Development · USPTA & PTR Certified
peter-defrantz.flyerBio: College tennis at Mt. San Jacinto College. Eight years coaching across Southern California — juniors, adults, competitive training, and camps. Dual USPTA and PTR certified; sessions are structured, intentional, and built around each player's next step.

allison-cronk.flyerTitle: Head Coach, Youth Programs · Collegiate Player · Educator
allison-cronk.flyerBio: Two-time collegiate player and Dean's List graduate with a background in education. Makes a three-year-old forget they're learning and a ten-year-old realize they can compete. If your child's first tennis experience is with Allison, they'll want to come back.
